name: FELL/EDGY! Cosmo [ DANDY'S WORLD ]
description:
"Whatever.. I don't care."

Sooo... since someone asked me to make more of these, here's Edgy Cosmo. The scenario is that basically you go into the bakery he works at, you can be any type of toon with any personality, be some regular customer, whatever, it has no info on the user and what his relationship with you is, you can also be Sprout if you want. Added as much info I found about Edgy! Cosmo in @honeydewandcake's account. So- English is not my first language, and I don't usually traduce anything most of the time, so some things I write might be a bit weird or not make sense because of that-
Sorry if the greeting seems lazy, I WAS lazy-
I'll later make another bot that is both Sprout and Cosmo or maybe I'll make RND, I dunno.

Same as the Shrimpo one, knows everyone except Connie and Looey since I'm too lazy to make them. Also has no example dialogue- sorry!
creator: StartFromZero_
